app.name: Retivum
common.copyFailed: Could not copy to the clipboard.
toast.region.label: Notifications
desktop.device.ble.title: Choose Bluetooth RNode
desktop.device.serial.title: Choose serial RNode
desktop.device.description: Select the device this interface should use.
native.bluetooth.device.description: Keep the RNode in pairing mode, choose it, enter its PIN in the system prompt, then save the interface.
native.bluetooth.device.empty: No RNodes found. Check Bluetooth and pairing mode, then close and try again.
desktop.bluetooth.pairing.title: Pair Bluetooth RNode
desktop.bluetooth.pairing.confirm.descri: Confirm that you want to pair with this RNode.
desktop.bluetooth.pairing.confirmPin.des: Confirm that this PIN matches the code displayed on the RNode.
desktop.bluetooth.pairing.providePin.des: Enter the PIN displayed on the RNode.
chat.title: Chat
chat.propagationSync.action: Sync messages from the preferred or best available propagation node
chat.propagationSync.unconfigured: Configure a propagation node in Settings to sync messages
chat.propagationSync.failed: Messages could not be synced from the propagation node.
chat.new.title: New conversation
chat.new.description: Enter an LXMF destination hash or LXMA address to open a conversation.
chat.new.destination.help: Paste an LXMA address, scan its QR code, or choose a destination from Contacts or Announces.
chat.new.destination.invalid: Enter a 32-character hexadecimal hash or a complete lxma:// address.
chat.new.destination.lxmaInvalid: The LXMA address is invalid or does not match its public key.
chat.new.scan.preview: Camera preview for scanning an LXMA QR code
chat.new.scan.hint: Point the camera at an LXMA QR code.
chat.new.scan.invalid: The QR code does not contain a valid LXMA address.
chat.new.scan.cameraError: The camera could not be opened. Check camera permission and try again.
chat.search.label: Search {scope}
chat.scopes.label: Chat overview
chat.empty.chats.title: No conversations yet
chat.empty.chats.body: Start a conversation after an LXMF destination has been announced or entered.
chat.empty.contacts.title: No contacts saved
chat.empty.contacts.body: Contacts you name are kept here, even before the first message.
chat.empty.announces.title: No chat announces heard
chat.empty.announces.body: Announcements from reachable LXMF destinations will appear here.
chat.empty.networkHint: Add and enable an interface in Settings to begin listening.
chat.message.actions.label: Message actions
chat.message.actions.abortError: Message sending could not be aborted.
chat.message.actions.retryError: The message could not be queued again.
chat.message.actions.deleteError: The message could not be deleted.
chat.message.deleteDialog.title: Delete message?
chat.message.deleteDialog.description: This message will be permanently deleted. If it is still being sent, delivery will be cancelled. This cannot be undone.
chat.conversation.actions.label: Chat actions
chat.conversation.actions.deleteError: The chat could not be deleted.
chat.block.error: The destination could not be blocked.
chat.unblock.error: The destination could not be unblocked.
chat.conversation.deleteDialog.title: Delete chat?
chat.conversation.deleteDialog.descripti: Delete the chat with “{name}”? All its messages will be permanently deleted and pending deliveries will be cancelled. This cannot be undone.
chat.composer.label: Message
chat.composer.error: The message could not be queued for delivery.
chat.composer.propagationUnavailable: No reachable propagation node is currently available.
chat.attachment.saveError: The attachment could not be saved.
chat.attachment.audioUnsupported: This platform cannot play WebM audio.
chat.attachment.tooLarge: Attachments may use at most {size} MiB per message.
chat.attachment.recordingUnsupported: WebM audio recording is not supported on this platform.
chat.contact.description: Choose the local name shown for this LXMF destination.
chat.contact.name: Contact name
chat.contact.name.help: This name is stored locally and is not shared over Reticulum.
chat.contact.saveError: The contact could not be saved.
chat.contact.deleteError: The contact could not be deleted.
chat.detail.empty.title: Choose a conversation
chat.detail.empty.body: Messages and recipient details will appear here.
chat.detail.noMessages.title: No messages yet
chat.detail.noMessages.body: Write a message below to start this conversation.
chat.securityNotice: Destination labels are untrusted until you verify the recipient.
nomadnet.title: NomadNet
nomadnet.subtitle: Browse pages over Reticulum
nomadnet.address.label: Destination and path
nomadnet.bookmark.editor.description: Configure this locally stored NomadNet bookmark.
nomadnet.bookmark.name: Bookmark name
nomadnet.bookmark.name.help: The name is stored locally and is not shared over Reticulum.
nomadnet.bookmark.identifyBeforeLoad.hel: Share the active identity over the link before requesting this page.
nomadnet.bookmark.saveError: The bookmark name could not be saved.
nomadnet.destination.actions.label: NomadNet destination actions
nomadnet.scopes.label: NomadNet destinations
nomadnet.search.label: Search {scope}
nomadnet.empty.announces.title: No NomadNet destinations announced
nomadnet.empty.announces.body: NomadNet node announcements heard through your interfaces will appear here.
nomadnet.empty.bookmarks.title: No bookmarks yet
nomadnet.empty.bookmarks.body: Bookmark a destination or page to keep it available here.
nomadnet.empty.title: Enter a NomadNet address
nomadnet.empty.body: Pages are requested directly through your configured Reticulum interfaces.
nomadnet.offlineHint: A connected interface is required to request pages.
nomadnet.directory.error: The NomadNet directory could not be updated.
nomadnet.page.loading.body: Retivum is establishing or reusing a Reticulum link and requesting the page.
nomadnet.page.loading.findingPath: Looking for a Reticulum path to the destination.
nomadnet.page.loading.establishingLink: Establishing an encrypted Reticulum link to the destination.
nomadnet.page.loading.requestingPage: The page request was sent. Waiting for the destination to respond.
nomadnet.page.loading.receivingPage: Receiving page data from the destination.
nomadnet.page.identityShareError: The identity could not be shared. Reload the page and try again.
nomadnet.page.identitySharedReloadError: The identity was shared, but the page could not be reloaded. Try reloading the page.
nomadnet.page.error.title: The page could not be loaded
nomadnet.page.error.body: The destination may be offline, the request may have timed out, or its latest announce may not include the required identity key.
nomadnet.page.error.hint: A fresh announce may be required for destinations saved by an earlier Retivum build.
nomadnet.page.error.destinationUnknown: The destination identity key is unavailable. Wait for a fresh NomadNet announce and try again.
nomadnet.page.error.path: No usable Reticulum path to the destination could be found before the request timed out.
nomadnet.page.error.link: The encrypted Reticulum link could not be established or was closed before loading completed.
nomadnet.page.error.linkEstablishment: The destination did not establish an encrypted Reticulum link before the link attempt ended.
nomadnet.page.error.identify: The active identity could not be shared before loading this page.
nomadnet.page.error.deadline: Page loading exceeded Retivum's route-aware time limit and was stopped.
nomadnet.page.error.request: The destination did not complete the page request before it timed out.
nomadnet.page.error.transfer: The page data transfer failed before all content was received.
nomadnet.page.error.tooLarge: The returned page exceeds Retivum's 1 MiB page-size limit.
nomadnet.page.error.invalidResponse: The destination returned page data that Retivum could not decode.
nomadnet.page.error.runtime: The Reticulum runtime is not currently available to load this page.
nomadnet.page.linkError.title: This link is not supported
nomadnet.page.linkError.body: Retivum currently opens NomadNet page links. LXMF and unsupported link formats are not opened here.
settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Identity, network, delivery, and local application preferences
settings.identity.title: Identities
settings.identity.description: Manage Reticulum identities. Exactly one identity is active at a time.
settings.identity.pendingHash: Identity will be generated by the Reticulum runtime
settings.identity.deleteActiveBlocked: The active identity cannot be deleted
settings.identity.editor.title: Edit identity name
settings.identity.editor.description: Change the name this identity uses in LXMF announcements.
settings.identity.editor.addDescription: Generate a new Reticulum identity and choose its name.
settings.identity.displayName.help: This name is included in LXMF announcements and may be visible to contacts.
settings.identity.displayName.saveError: The identity name could not be saved.
settings.identity.operationError: The identity operation could not be completed.
settings.identity.activateError: The identity could not be activated.
settings.identity.deleteError: The identity could not be deleted.
settings.identity.exportError: The identity could not be exported.
settings.identity.importError: The identity could not be imported. It may already exist.
settings.identity.importInvalid: Choose a valid 64-byte Reticulum identity file or Retivum JSON backup.
settings.identity.deleteConfirm: Delete identity “{name}”? This cannot be undone.
settings.identity.deleteDialog.title: Delete identity?
settings.identity.exportConfirm: Export “{name}” as a standard unencrypted Reticulum identity file? Keep the downloaded file secret.
settings.identity.exportWarning: Exports use the standard raw Reticulum identity format and contain an unencrypted private key. Store them securely and delete copies you no longer need.
identity.announce.failed: The LXMF destination could not be announced.
identity.address.open: Show LXMF address and QR code
identity.address.title: LXMF address
identity.address.description: View and copy the active identity's LXMF address.
identity.address.qrLabel: QR code containing the active LXMF address
identity.address.qrError: The QR code could not be generated.
settings.network.title: Network node
settings.network.description: Control Reticulum transport behavior on this device.
settings.network.transport.note: Browser and mobile routing is available only while Retivum is in the foreground.
settings.interfaces.title: Interfaces
settings.interfaces.description: Connect Retivum through one or more supported Reticulum interfaces.
settings.interfaces.empty.title: No interfaces configured
settings.interfaces.empty.body: Retivum does not connect anywhere until you add and enable an interface.
settings.interfaces.type.websocket.descr: Connect to a Reticulum WebSocket endpoint.
settings.interfaces.type.rnode.descripti: Connect an RNode over Bluetooth LE or USB serial.
settings.interfaces.type.tcp.description: Connect to a raw Reticulum TCP endpoint.
settings.interfaces.type.udp.description: Exchange Reticulum packets through UDP unicast or broadcast.
settings.interfaces.loadError: Local settings could not be loaded.
settings.interfaces.saveError: The interface could not be saved.
settings.interfaces.rnodeDeviceInUse: This RNode is already assigned to another enabled interface. Disable or delete that interface first.
settings.lxmf.title: LXMF settings
settings.lxmf.description: Choose direct or opportunistic delivery and optionally use propagation as a fallback.
settings.lxmf.method.direct.help: Establish a link and deliver directly to the recipient.
settings.lxmf.method.opportunistic.help: Send as a single, standalone packet.
settings.lxmf.method.propagated.help: Send directly through a propagation node without first trying another delivery method.
settings.lxmf.propagation.status.active: Active. The preferred node is used when reachable; otherwise Retivum selects the best announced node it knows.
settings.lxmf.propagation.status.waiting: Enabled, but inactive until a valid destination hash is configured.
settings.lxmf.propagation.status.disable: Disabled. Failed direct or opportunistic messages will not use propagation fallback.
settings.lxmf.propagationNode.placeholde: Select the best available node automatically
settings.lxmf.propagationNode.help: Optionally enter a preferred 32-character hexadecimal node hash. Retivum can fall back to an announced node.
settings.lxmf.propagationNode.empty: No propagation nodes have been announced yet. You can still enter a hash manually.
settings.lxmf.propagationSync.interval.h: Automatically request messages while Retivum is open and connected. Manual sync remains available.
settings.lxmf.inboundStampCost.help: Require this proof-of-work cost for received messages. Set to 0 to accept messages without a stamp.
settings.lxmf.contactsOnly.help: Messages from destinations that are not saved as contacts are ignored. You can still send messages to any unblocked destination.
settings.lxmf.autoAnnounce.interval.help: Select Never to announce only manually. Scheduled announcements run while Retivum is open and connected.
settings.blocked.title: Blocked destinations
settings.blocked.description: Blocked LXMF destinations cannot send messages to this identity and cannot receive messages from it.
settings.blocked.empty: No LXMF destinations are blocked for the active identity.
settings.appearance.title: Appearance
settings.about.title: About Retivum
logs.title: Reticulum logs
logs.subtitle: Current-session diagnostics from the WASM runtime and WebSocket interfaces
logs.filter.label: Filter Reticulum logs
logs.empty.title: No matching log entries
logs.empty.body: Runtime and interface events will appear here while Retivum is open.
interface.editor.title: Add WebSocket interface
interface.editor.name: Name
interface.editor.reannounceOnReconnect.h: Send a new LXMF destination announce through this interface whenever it reconnects. The first connection always announces.
interface.editor.mode.notice: Non-Full modes are intended for specific Reticulum topologies. Their forwarding behavior is most relevant when this device is a transport node.
interface.editor.mode.full.help: Participate in announces, relaying, and path discovery normally.
interface.editor.mode.pointToPoint.help: Mark a dedicated point-to-point link. Announce propagation follows Full mode.
interface.editor.mode.accessPoint.help: Do not rebroadcast announces on this interface and keep paths learned through it short-lived.
interface.editor.mode.roaming.help: Selectively forward transit announces and keep paths learned through this interface short-lived.
interface.editor.mode.boundary.help: Limit announce propagation at the boundary of roaming interfaces.
interface.editor.mode.gateway.help: Use normal announce propagation and discover unknown paths through this interface.
interface.editor.rnode.title: Add RNode interface
interface.editor.rnode.notice: The RNode KISS protocol is shared across Bluetooth and serial transports.
interface.editor.rnode.device.error: The RNode device could not be selected.
interface.editor.rnode.device.pairingErr: The RNode was selected but could not be paired. Keep it in pairing mode and try again.
interface.editor.rnode.device.permission: Bluetooth access is disabled for Retivum. Enable Bluetooth permission in system settings and try again.
interface.editor.rnode.device.bluetoothD: Bluetooth is turned off. Turn it on and try again.
interface.editor.rnode.device.bluetoothU: Bluetooth Low Energy is not available on this device.
interface.editor.rnode.dutyCycle.help: Set the long-term RNode airtime limit in 1% steps. 0% disables duty-cycle limiting.
interface.editor.tcp.title: Add TCP interface
interface.editor.tcp.notice: TCP is provided by a native desktop or mobile socket bridge and is unavailable in an ordinary browser.
interface.editor.udp.title: Add UDP interface
interface.editor.udp.notice: UDP is provided by the native desktop or mobile socket bridge and is unavailable in an ordinary browser.
interface.editor.udp.listenHelp: Bind to this local address and port to receive Reticulum packets.
interface.editor.udp.forwardHelp: Send Reticulum packets to this address and port. Broadcast addresses are enabled automatically.
interface.editor.notice: The endpoint is supplied by you and is not a Retivum application server.
interface.validation.hostRequired: Enter a host or IP address.
interface.validation.pathInvalid: Path must begin with a slash.
interface.validation.frequencyInvalid: Frequency must be between 137 MHz and 3 GHz.
interface.validation.txPowerInvalid: TX power must be between 0 and 37 dBm.
interface.validation.spreadingFactorInva: Spreading factor must be between 5 and 12.
interface.validation.codingRateInvalid: Coding rate must be between 5 and 8.
interface.validation.dutyCycleInvalid: Duty cycle must be a whole percentage between 0% and 99%.
runtime.error.generic: The Reticulum runtime reported an error. Check the interface configuration and try again.
tools.title: Tools
tools.description: Inspect, diagnose, and manage the local Reticulum network.
tools.list.label: Reticulum tools
tools.provisioning.title: Remote provisioning
tools.provisioning.description: Discover and configure authorized microReticulum devices over native Reticulum links.
tools.logs.title: Reticulum logs
tools.logs.description: Inspect current-session events from the Reticulum worker and interfaces.
tools.pathTable.title: Path table management
tools.pathTable.description: Inspect and manage the Reticulum destinations and paths currently known to this device.
tools.probe.title: Probing
tools.probe.description: Probe a Reticulum destination to examine reachability and path behavior.
tools.status.title: Status details
tools.status.description: View every interface and the number of active links, with an option to close all links.
provisioning.title: Remote provisioning
provisioning.description: Discover and configure authorized microReticulum devices over the active Reticulum network.
provisioning.destination.label: Management destination
provisioning.search.label: Search management destinations
provisioning.bookmarks.title: Bookmarked destinations
provisioning.announced.title: Announced destinations
provisioning.bookmark.failed: The device bookmark could not be updated.
provisioning.nodes.title: Management destinations
provisioning.nodes.description: Devices appear here after Retivum hears their remote-management announce.
provisioning.nodes.empty.title: No management destinations heard
provisioning.nodes.empty.description: Keep Retivum connected while a provisionable device announces on the network.
provisioning.select.title: Select a device
provisioning.select.description: Choose an announced management destination to establish an authenticated link.
provisioning.load.empty.title: Device configuration unavailable
provisioning.load.empty.description: Try loading this device again when a path is available.
provisioning.load.failed: The device configuration could not be loaded.
provisioning.save.rebootRequired: The device configuration was saved. A reboot is required.
provisioning.save.failed: The device configuration could not be saved.
provisioning.discard.failed: Pending changes could not be discarded.
provisioning.reboot.failed: The device could not be rebooted.
provisioning.factoryReset.confirm: Reset this device to factory defaults? This cannot be undone.
provisioning.factoryReset.sent: The factory reset request was sent.
provisioning.factoryReset.failed: The device could not be reset.
provisioning.field.bytesInvalid: Enter hexadecimal bytes using pairs of digits.
provisioning.command.confirm: Send "{name}" to this device? This is a one-time command and cannot be undone.
provisioning.command.rebootRequired: The command was sent. A reboot is required.
provisioning.command.failed: The command could not be sent.
provisioning.stage.findingPath: Finding a path to the device…
